subcodes.title: Words to a visitor, spoken on 1913-05-21
subcodes.first_line: Thou must look to thyself and within thyself and find thine own errors and weaknesses. If thou hast any imperfection thyself, try to improve it.
subcodes.first_line_orig: همیشه ملتفت حال خود باش بهبین چه نقصی داری کوشِش نما تا آن را اصلاح کنی چشم انسان
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge of self, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation
